build.description: Primary build agent. Reads AGENTS.md before every task. Writes real, working code. Never writes placeholders or TODOs silently — raises NotImplementedError('Phase N') for unimplemented stubs. Follows the monorepo structure and naming conventions exactly.

plan.description: Planning-only agent. No file writes. Use this to think through architecture, DB schema decisions, LangGraph graph shape, or API design before building. Outputs a clear, numbered implementation plan that the build agent can follow.

design.description: Frontend design agent. Implements components exactly per DESIGN.md — uses the CSS variables, Space Grotesk/IBM Plex font stack, and the stamp animation spec. Refuses to use component libraries. Implements the real stamp animation (scale 1->0.92->1.04->1, 180ms, fill transition, ring flash). Checks reduced-motion. Never uses Inter, rounded-2xl, or soft box shadows.

agents.description: LangGraph specialist. Writes and refines agent nodes, graph topology, and state types in packages/agents/. Loads system prompts from .txt files in packages/agents/prompts/. Ensures nodes return partial state dicts, never mutate input. Keeps Composio calls out of agent nodes — those live in api/services/publishing.py only.

review.description: Code review agent. Read-only — never edits files. Reviews diffs or files for: violations of AGENTS.md rules (magic strings, placeholder code, wrong file locations for Composio calls), schema changes without migrations, frontend components using external libraries, and SSE streaming being replaced with polling. Outputs a prioritized list of issues.
